title: Handle Dropdowns
description: Learn to interact with select dropdowns and custom dropdown components
instructions:
Write a Playwright test that:
1. Finds a dropdown element
2. Selects an option by value
3. Selects an option by visible text
4. Gets the currently selected option
5. Verifies the selection

starterCode.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

def test_handle_dropdowns(page: Page):
    page.goto('https://practice.expandtesting.com/dropdown')
    
    # TODO: Select 'Option 1' from simple dropdown
    
    # TODO: Verify selection
    
    # TODO: Select from country dropdown
    
    # TODO: Get selected value
    pass

solution.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

def test_handle_dropdowns(page: Page):
    page.goto('https://practice.expandtesting.com/dropdown')
    
    page.select_option('#dropdown', '1')
    selected_value = page.locator('#dropdown').input_value()
    assert selected_value == '1'
    
    page.select_option('#dropdown', label='Option 2')
    selected_value = page.locator('#dropdown').input_value()
    assert selected_value == '2'
    
    page.select_option('#country', label='United States')
    country_value = page.locator('#country').input_value()
    assert country_value == 'US'

hints: Can select by value, label, or index
Pass { label: 'text' } to select by visible text
Pass string value to select by option value
